title: (BUG) Hashtag normalization inconsistent between import and posting
description: Hashtags imported from Mastodon archives (import.rs line 326) are normalized as `.trim_start_matches('#').to_lowercase()` — preserving underscores and other non-alphanumeric chars. But hashtags from native posts (posting.rs lines 362-367) are normalized with `.chars().filter(|c| c.is_alphanumeric()).collect::<String>().to_lowercase()` — stripping underscores. Result: the same hashtag 'hello_world' becomes 'hello_world' via import but 'helloworld' via posting. Tag-based searches and followed_tags matching will miss cross-origin posts. Fix: use the same normalization in both paths.
